question: What are the names and total rental hours for each vehicle?
sql: SELECT Vehicles.name, SUM(Renting_history.total_hours) FROM Vehicles JOIN Renting_history ON Vehicles.id = Renting_history.vehicles_id GROUP BY Vehicles.name;

back_translation.intent: 计算每辆车的总租赁时长

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取每辆车的名称和总租赁时长，SQL反向翻译描述正确包含目标表(Vehicles, Renting_history)、列(Vehicles.name, Renting_history.total_hours)、聚合(SUM)和分组(Vehicles.name)逻辑，且无额外过滤/排序限制，完全匹配需求。
